tweets.text:
Flanders to Touk feels like the SuperCoach panic button.

Safe? Yep.
Inspiring? Not really.
Bailey has the bye, Sanders cooks R16, JHF can vanish and Rankine is hurt.

I genuinely hate every path.

Who’s the least bad trade?

#AFL #AFLSuperCoach #SuperCoach
